actions.advise.description: Contextual authored-route and roll advice for one KP-interpreted player action. Read-only; direct delivery, Push, retry, and narrative suggestions are all soft and never force or block play. Canonical operation `actions.advise`; the result envelope is authoritative.

campaign.description: Campaign id. Required for campaign-bound operations.

intent_evidence.description: optional KP semantic result; bind authored routes only with matched_affordance_ids or selected_affordance_ids from the current action_routes index

examples.semantic_reason: the player asks the clerk to retrieve the house file

matched_affordance_ids.description: preferred exact route IDs from scene.context.action_routes

method.description: optional semantic description of the attempted method

normalized_action_atoms.description: optional structured atoms from a semantic host resolver

precautions.description: optional precautions explicitly established by the player

primary_intent.description: KP semantic label for the player's main intent

semantic_reason.description: why this structured interpretation fits the actual player action

target.description: optional semantic target of the action

investigator.description: investigator id (optional when party has one member)

player_text.description: optional exact player message for combined Director/Storylet advice

root.description: Project root containing .coc; defaults to the host workspace.

actions.advise.summary: Contextual authored-route and roll advice for one KP-interpreted player action. Read-only; direct delivery, Push, retry, and narrative suggestions are all soft and never force or block play.

Canonical operation `progressive.claim_host_work`; the result envelope is authoritative.

loss_failure.description: loss on failure (int or dice, e.g. '1D6')

setup.invoke.description: Invoke one existing canonical custom-campaign setup operation. This thin MCP-facing gateway delegates schema, source-bundle, path, and state validation to the shared pre-session setup runtime. Canonical operation `setup.invoke`; the result envelope is authoritative.

campaign.description: Campaign id. Required for campaign-bound operations.

payload.description: exact payload for the selected kind: campaign.create requires campaign_id/title and optionally ruleset_id/era/play_language/start_clock; actor.create requires campaign_id/actor_id/sheet and delegates validation to that campaign's ruleset; investigator.create requires investigator_id/sheet and optionally creation; campaign.link_investigator requires exactly campaign_id/investigator_ids; scenario.bind_pdf requires campaign_id/scenario_id/title/source_bundle_path and optionally compile_now; campaign.render_briefing requires campaign_id and optionally language; investigator.render_card requires campaign_id/investigator_id and optionally language/html_mode. Per-kind allowed fields are enforced by the canonical setup runtime. For installed-host progressive binding, omit compile_now or pass false; true requires the repository cold compiler runtime and is not part of the opening critical path

compile_now.description: optional cold full-module compile request; omit or pass false for installed-host progressive import. true is accepted only when the repository compiler runtime is available and must not block the playable opening

root.description: Project root containing .coc; defaults to the host workspace.

setup.invoke.summary: Invoke one existing canonical custom-campaign setup operation. This thin MCP-facing gateway delegates schema, source-bundle, path, and state validation to the shared pre-session setup runtime.

campaign.description: Campaign id. Required for campaign-bound operations.

campaign_id.description: optional stable campaign id; omit to let the canonical starter choose one

pregen_id.description: exact pregen_id returned by setup.inspect for that scenario

scenario_id.description: exact built-in scenario_id returned by setup.inspect

setup.quick_start.summary: Create a canonical built-in starter campaign and linked pregen investigator through the shared setup gateway. The starter path defaults player-visible play_language to zh-Hans.

state.clock_discontinuity.description: Replace the in-fiction civil-calendar anchor for an explicit time shift, loop reset, dream transition, or correction while preserving monotonic elapsed time and relative deadlines. Canonical operation `state.clock_discontinuity`; the result envelope is authoritative.

calendar_mode.description: calendar used by the target civil-time anchor

campaign.description: Campaign id. Required for campaign-bound operations.

civil_anchor_elapsed.description: optional prior monotonic elapsed position where this civil anchor became true; use only for delayed recovery/correction from authoritative evidence

day_phase.description: broad source-supported phase when no exact time is known

discontinuity_kind.description: structured semantic kind chosen by the KP; never inferred from prose

display.description: faithful campaign-language rendering of the target civil time

local_date.description: ISO local date when the source establishes a date without an exact time

local_datetime.description: ISO local datetime when precision is exact/minute/hour

precision.description: source-supported precision; day_phase/date avoid inventing an exact clock time

source_ref.description: optional module or campaign-canon provenance reference

timezone.description: target timezone when meaningful; omission clears a stale prior timezone

state.exceptional_effect.description: Apply or consume one source-bound substantive consequence/reward for a critical, fumble, failed pushed check, or exceptional first-impression check. This is canonical state, not prose advice. Canonical operation `state.exceptional_effect`; the result envelope is authoritative.

boundary.description: exactly one of {kind:immediate}; {kind:until_consumed,uses:1}; {kind:until_scene_end,scene_id}; {kind:until_time_marker,marker_id}; {kind:until_condition,description}. until_condition.description is rendered verbatim to the player and must use the campaign's active play_language

campaign.description: Campaign id. Required for campaign-bound operations.

causal_link.description: exact player-visible causal wording rendered verbatim; write it in the campaign's active play_language, not as internal audit reasoning

consuming_roll_id.description: later roll that actually used the modifier (consume)

effect_kind.description: bonus_die | penalty_die | condition | restriction | relationship_or_clock | scene_event | resource_delta

mechanics.description: bonus/penalty={dice,investigator_id,skill,scene_id:null|string,target_id:null|npc_id}; non-null target_id also requires localized target_display_name; NPC-scoped relationship bonus additionally requires source_decision_ids linking state.npc_update; condition={target_id,condition_id,scene_id}; restriction={subject_id,restriction_id,scope,scene_id}; scene_event={scene_id,event_id,change_kind}; resource_delta={source_decision_ids}; relationship_or_clock={source_decision_ids,affected_id,change_summary}

player_visible_impact.description: exact concise mechanical/fictional impact rendered verbatim to the player; write it in the campaign's active play_language

resolution_event_ids.description: canonical event_id/decision_id evidence that satisfied a non-roll until_condition boundary (resolve)

resolution_reason.description: semantic reason the successful check satisfies the recorded boundary (resolve)

resolution_roll_id.description: successful canonical check that satisfied an until_condition boundary (resolve)

root.description: Project root containing .coc; defaults to the host workspace.

state.exceptional_effect.summary: Apply or consume one source-bound substantive consequence/reward for a critical, fumble, failed pushed check, or exceptional first-impression check. This is canonical state, not prose advice.

campaign.description: Campaign id. Required for campaign-bound operations.

minutes_from_now.description: minutes until due; required for set/reset and must be >= 0

root.description: Project root containing .coc; defaults to the host workspace.

state.time_marker.summary: Set, reset, or clear a persistent in-fiction deadline marker. Bookkeeping only; it never auto-fires narrative effects.

storylets.suggest.description: Run the existing rich storylet scheduler against a Director candidate plan. Advisory only; selection never applies itself. Canonical operation `storylets.suggest`; the result envelope is authoritative.

campaign.description: Campaign id. Required for campaign-bound operations.

player_text.description: exact player message used for the Director context

root.description: Project root containing .coc; defaults to the host workspace.

storylets.suggest.summary: Run the existing rich storylet scheduler against a Director candidate plan. Advisory only; selection never applies itself.

threat.query.description: Read authored threat fronts with verified live current_segments projected onto them. Canonical operation `threat.query`; the result envelope is authoritative.

campaign.description: Campaign id. Required for campaign-bound operations.

root.description: Project root containing .coc; defaults to the host workspace.

threat.query.summary: Read authored threat fronts with verified live current_segments projected onto them.

turn.finalize.description: Hard final boundary for one journaled turn. Validates exact causal coverage and paragraph-level mechanic placement, inserts authoritative dice/changes/context at those causal boundaries, persists hashes, and returns rendered_text that direct hosts must echo verbatim. Canonical operation `turn.finalize`; the result envelope is authoritative.

advisory_uptake.description: optional proof that one actions.advise Storylet candidate actually shaped this finalized draft; use candidate_ref, while storylet_candidate remains a legacy compatibility input

campaign.description: Campaign id. Required for campaign-bound operations.

coverage.description: one closed semantic coverage row per obligation from turn.output_context

draft.description: exact player-facing fictional prose, without deterministic dice/change blocks

mechanics_placements.description: optional override rows {after_paragraph (zero-based), segment_type, source_ids}; omit for safe causal defaults, or supply every source exactly once when deliberate interleaving is needed

repair_finalization_id.description: optional latest finalization id; permits a prose/placement-only replacement only while that exact output remains delivery-unconfirmed

root.description: Project root containing .coc; defaults to the host workspace.

validate_only.description: optional preflight: run the full finalize validation and return every violation at once (error.violations) without writing any receipt

turn.finalize.summary: Hard final boundary for one journaled turn. Validates exact causal coverage and paragraph-level mechanic placement, inserts authoritative dice/changes/context at those causal boundaries, persists hashes, and returns rendered_text that direct hosts must echo verbatim.

turn.output_context.description: Read the latest unfinalized journal's causal obligations, Keeper-only NPC performance constraints, source-bound exceptional-effect status, and deterministic player-mechanics bundle. Call only after all settlement and state.journal. Canonical operation `turn.output_context`; the result envelope is authoritative.

campaign.description: Campaign id. Required for campaign-bound operations.

root.description: Project root containing .coc; defaults to the host workspace.

turn.output_context.summary: Read the latest unfinalized journal's causal obligations, Keeper-only NPC performance constraints, source-bound exceptional-effect status, and deterministic player-mechanics bundle. Call only after all settlement and state.journal.
